name: Agent Dashboard
description: A personal new-tab dashboard with search, shortcuts, weather, market data, and video recommendations.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https: data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://api.zhoutianwen.com http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' https: blob:
